steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to describe the format of “7 haiku (for St. Augustine).” Format means structural composition. The notes contain exactly one format detail: “The poem is written as a sequence of seven haiku.”

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Sanchez chose the form used in the poem because it helps “maintain memory and dignity.”': Describes Sanchez's motivation for the form, not the format itself. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The poem was published in the 2010 book Morning Haiku, which “celebrates the gifts of life...”': Describes publication context and the book's theme, not the poem's format. ✗
  • Choice C — 'The poems in Morning Haiku (2010) are each written as a sequence of haiku.': Overgeneralizes to all poems in the book and omits the specific number (seven) from the notes. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The poem “7 haiku (for St. Augustine)” is written as a sequence of seven haiku.': Directly states the poem's format using the specific detail from the notes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
